The '''P-100 Salvage Droid''' was a large model of [[repulsorlift]] [[salvage droid]] used for retrieving valuable parts from crashed [[podracer]]s. Using an omnidirectional homing device, the P-100 Salvage Droid located a crashed podracer's [[distress beacon]] and deployed a [[P-100 pick-up droid]] from its underside to salvage up to 500 [[kilogram]]s of scrap. If an owner did not claim their parts within two [[Standard hour|hours]], they would either be auctioned or sold, often to [[Jawa]]s.<ref name="CL" />

==History==
===Boonta Eve===
[[32 BBY|Ten]] [[Standard year|years]] before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars]] several units of P-100 Salvage Droids were utilized on the [[Outer Rim Territories|Outer Rim]] [[planet]] of [[Tatooine]]. These droids were used in the [[Boonta Eve Classic]], a [[Podracing|podrace]] in the settlement of [[Mos Espa]], to retrieve the wreckage of downed [[podracer]]s so that they could either be retrieved by the owner or sold to [[Jawa]]s. Eventually the race was won by the [[human]] [[Gender|boy]] Anakin Skywalker, who was betting his freedom from slavery on the race.<ref name="Phantom Menace">{{Film|I}}</ref>
